summary: Morning cycle 2026-03-29. Major wins since last cycle: KE-2 (#917) SHIPPED — v3.0 critical blocker eliminated. Swarm P0 (#1186) CLOSED. No-Governance-Self-Modification false positive (#1254) CLOSED (fix in #1351). CI main all green. v2.10.3 published. HQ action this cycle: fixed 3 cron collisions in server/schedule.json (closed #1327). Remaining: PR #1349 merge conflict (human rebase needed). New P1 dogfood: #1347 rtk prefix breaks bootstrap exemption. Version drift: cloud 2.10.1, analytics 2.10.2 vs kernel 2.10.3. New ShellForge initiative: 6 issues (#1362–#1367), no squad assigned yet.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: rtk prefix breaks bootstrap exemption pattern matching
dogfoodPatterns.description: claude-hook-wrapper.sh uses exact string matching for bootstrap exemptions. Global CLAUDE.md instructs all agents to prefix commands with rtk, so 'rtk pnpm install --force' doesn't match the 'pnpm install --force' allowlist pattern. Chicken-and-egg bootstrap failure.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Patch claude-hook-wrapper.sh to strip rtk prefix before bootstrap exemption pattern matching, or add rtk-prefixed variants to the allowlist.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: docker stop/rm blocked for named ephemeral test containers
dogfoodPatterns.description: Destructive command guard blocks docker stop/rm on named ephemeral test containers (bench-devs-test-db). No distinction between production and test containers.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add policy allowlist for known test container name patterns or expose a test-scope context.

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as unknown.

crossCuttingIssues.action: Kernel/adapters squad: patch hook wrapper bootstrap exemption
